# BlueMax Media

> BlueMax Media is a creative audiovisual production company founded in 2015, specializing in action sports filmmaking. We create films, commercials, documentaries, and content for bold brands and elite athletes across mountain sports, motorsports, and extreme disciplines.

BlueMax Media operates at the intersection of sport and storytelling. Our crews are athletes themselves — riders, mountaineers, explorers, runners — which gives us an authentic edge in capturing real performance in demanding conditions.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/): Overview of our work and expertise
- [About](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/about/): Our story, founders, and team
- [Works](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/works/): Full portfolio of productions
- [Contact](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/contact/): Get in touch

## Services

- [Films](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/works/films/): Short films and feature productions
- [Commercials](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/works/commercial/): Brand advertising content
- [Documentaries](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/works/documentaries/): Long-form documentary projects
- [Content](https://www.bluemaxmedia.com/works/content/): Social and digital content

## Notable clients

Salomon, Red Bull, Audi, Faction Skis, Michelin, Airbnb, Montec, Insta360, BFGoodrich, The North Face, Nespresso, Prada, Puma, Renault, Skoda, TF1, Yamaha, Black Crows, Mountain Dew, Volvic

## Athletes featured

Candide Thovex, Alex Hall, Jesper Tjäder, Sarah Hoefflin, Victor de le Rue, Megan Oldham, Pierre Vaultier, Coline Ballet-Baz, Elisabeth Gerritzen, Sam Anthamatten, Matěj Švancer, Adrian Mattern, Jules Charraud, Kadi Gomis

## Team

- Nicolas Roubin — Business Manager & CGO
- Jean-Clément Lelard — Business Manager & Director
- Julien Eustache — Executive Producer & Director
